title: The Goose Woman
writer: Rex Beach, Dwinelle Benthall, Melville W. Brown
actors: Jack Pickford, Louise Dresser, Constance Bennett
plot: A famous opera singer lost her voice when her son was born, and has drowned her sorrows in drink. When a murder is committed near her house, she invents a story to get herself back in front of the public again. However, the story ...
